title: Clear Drops
description: Simple datapack to clear all dropped items every 5 minutes
body:
This is a simple datapack to clear all dropped items every 5 minutes. Before clearing the items, player will be given a warning in chat and a countdown in the action bar.
### Available commands:
`/function cleardrops:clear`: Clear dropped items immediatly \
`/function cleardrops:loop`: Restart the loop in case something messes it up \
`/function cleardrops:disable`: Temporarily disable the loop
